title: Blank Prototype Analysis
subtitle: Unveiling potential gaps in a nascent banking app concept.
problem_statement: Lack of visual content prevents analysis of user experience and market fit.

pillars.title: Clarity
pillars.insight: Users need clear visual cues to understand functionality.

pillars.title: Trust
pillars.insight: Building trust requires transparent information and secure feeling.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Seamless task completion is crucial for banking users.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we visualize core banking features?
How might users understand app's value?
How might we design for Indian market needs?

points.name: ICICI
points.desc: Good innovation, strong trust, broad services.

points.name: Paytm
points.desc: High innovation, lower trust, niche focus.

points.name: SBI
points.desc: Very high trust, low innovation, wide reach.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, reliable banking on the go.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient digital banking solutions.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Managing finances should be simple and intuitive.
personas.bio: Young professional balancing career and personal finances digitally.

insights: "I hope there are no hidden fees."

points.action: Replace blank screens with clear feature mockups.
Integrate financial planning with daily transactions.
Tailor UI/UX patterns from successful Indian apps.
Simplify complex banking jargon into plain language.

pivot.before: Ambiguity due to empty screens and lack of feature definition.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from abstract concept to concrete, visually rich user flows and features.
pivot.after: Clear, intuitive banking experience with defined value proposition.

annotations.title: Learn More
annotations.rationale: Button's purpose is unclear without context.

annotations.title: Close Icon
annotations.rationale: Indicates a modal or temporary overlay.

annotations.title: Blank Canvas
annotations.rationale: Primary observation: no content to evaluate.

data.finding: Only 'Learn more' and close button visible.
No consistent elements to evaluate yet.
No interactive elements to test error prevention.
No features to assess customization or efficiency.
